title: The Royal Family Thanks the Crew
description: On pages 12–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Sea Kings, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, King Neptune, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the royal family thanks the crew.
scene: The scene focuses on the royal family thanks the crew, with Unknown person #1, Sea Kings, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, King Neptune, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This isn't the time for crying!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: The Noah is no longer falling...

dialogue.speaker: Sea Kings
dialogue.text: The sea kings have stopped the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But one thing is for sure ...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: The Noah has not been destroyed!!!

summary: The Royal Family Thanks the Crew. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
